title: turnera stenophylla
intro: Turnera stenophylla, also known as Damiana, is a flowering plant native to the Americas and is commonly used as a medicinal herb. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and neuroprotective effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Turnera stenophylla include relief from anxiety and stress, improved sleep quality, and enhanced cognitive function. The plant can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal preparations such as infusions and decoctions.
